name: privacy-host-map
description: Engineer-grade third-party host / privacy map from HTML or knowledge/privacy notes — not legal advice

steps.text: Classify LOAD vs CONFIG vs CLICK vs BUNDLE. Bundle strings are not confirmed network calls.

steps.goal: Using skill privacy-host-map and knowledge/privacy/ (especially akl-libraries-third-party-hosts.md if relevant), produce a full third-party host privacy map for the user-supplied page or the Auckland Libraries catalogue guide example. Verdict first. Separate confirmed loads from bundle noise. Cover tag managers, search SaaS, iframes/Shielded, public keys, and next Network-tab checks. Not legal advice.
criteria: Bundle noise not listed as confirmed data-sharing
Sensitive surface tension covered if Shielded/safety widget present
One risk of trusting privacy policy alone
